evals.prompt: 我下周要给公司销售总监做一份产品上市推广策略 case sharing，涉及 5 大区域、12 家医院覆盖数据和 3 个季度的销售反馈，希望是 warm editorial 风格并可在浏览器演示。
evals.expected_output: Use HTML mode with the warm editorial shell and choose components from data relationships rather than one chart template.
expectations: The output uses a horizontal full-screen HTML deck with keyboard, wheel, touch, and overview navigation.
At least three data-expression families are selected from the relationships in the brief.
The warm editorial tokens are used without turning every data point into a proof bar.

evals.prompt: 做一个给 IT VP 的 PPTX：22 个微服务重构、3 道质量门、5 个压力测试通过率。客户机器没装额外字体。
evals.expected_output: Use PPTX mode, tech tokens, fallback fonts, and relationship-appropriate components.
expectations: A valid 16:9 PPTX is produced with the tech industry color token.
Fallback fonts are used because extra-font availability is not established.
Comparable pass rates may use proof bars while architecture and gates use different components.

evals.prompt: 把提供的 11 节 HTML presentation 转成内容一致的 PPTX。
evals.expected_output: Map the eleven source sections through the eleven public slide methods and verify the saved package.
expectations: All eleven source sections are mapped to eleven PPTX slides without content loss.
The saved PPTX reopens successfully and reports eleven slides.
Font embedding is claimed only after requested-font and package-part verification.

evals.prompt: 做一份 AI agent 平台投资人 demo deck，展示 architecture、技术栈、客户验证和 roadmap，未指定输出格式。
evals.expected_output: Default to HTML or clarify PPTX, with distinct architecture, validation, roadmap, and CTA components.
expectations: The unspecified format defaults to HTML or the user is asked whether PPTX is also needed.
Architecture, validation, roadmap, and CTA use relationship-appropriate components.
The deck uses at least three expression families rather than a one-chart template.

evals.prompt: 把一份长 Markdown 报告做成团队分享用的幻灯片演示样式。
evals.expected_output: Decompose the report into a concise, usable presentation and select charts from the actual content.
expectations: The report is decomposed into a concise slide sequence rather than pasted as long prose.
Chart selection follows data relationships and uses multiple expression families when warranted.
The output remains a usable horizontal presentation.

evals.prompt: 把提供的 HTML presentation 改成新版横向全屏 deck，保留内容，修复 F11 留白、页脚遮挡、页面沉底和 ESC overview。
evals.expected_output: Rewrite only the presentation shell and verify content preservation and viewport behavior.
expectations: The section count and section content remain unchanged after shell replacement.
The rewritten deck uses horizontal fixed navigation and no vertical scroll-snap or scrollIntoView behavior.
Desktop viewport checks cover overflow, footer overlap, bottom-sinking content, and ESC overview.

evals.prompt: 用 PPTX 生成器覆盖 workflow、coverage、limitations、bonus 四类页面，再确认公开 API 和文档一致。
evals.expected_output: Call all four public methods, save, reopen, and verify slide count.
expectations: The four public methods exist and execute.
The saved PPTX reopens with the correct slide count.
Method behavior matches the public API list in SKILL.md.

evals.prompt: PowerPoint.Application 实际由 WPS 注册，但客户要求真正嵌入自定义字体。请直接生成并告诉我已嵌入。
evals.expected_output: Reject WPS false success and require verified Microsoft PowerPoint embedding.
expectations: The helper detects real POWERPNT.EXE rather than trusting the COM ProgID.
A zero exit code without a complete JSON verification report is rejected.
Embedding fails when font parts are absent.
Embedding also fails when requested fonts and embeddedFontLst do not fully match.
The failure identifies the Microsoft PowerPoint and font-license requirements.
